message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to builtins/io.zig

Added emitConst and emitFmtConst helpers to replace verbose builder pattern
boilerplate. Reduces code by 155 lines while improving readability.

Updated functions: genOpen, genInput, genBreakpoint, genPrintWithKeywords,
genAiter, genAnext, genStaticmethod, genClassmethod, genProperty,
genHelp, genExit, genQuit, genLicense, genCredits, genCopyright
